author: pppec
content:
Hi everyone this is my week5 update. Mainly focused on erigon snapshot code base and dived deeper into more design document that erigon team shared with me. Also discussed with them about potential dos attack. Special thanks to Mario for the feedback!  
https://hackmd.io/@steven1/HJsA_I5Ezg

author: krisoshea.eth
content:
Hey everyone, here is my week five update. This week we mainly focused on creating and finalizing the project presentation for the Lodestar Builder.

We then moved into setting up our workspace in terms of how we're going to work and collab across the next 16 weeks. That involved things like forking the lodestar repo, setting up Linear, our code review tools, and then our collaboration communication tools that we'll be using going forward.

We also created our planning document and are thinking about how we're going to work with the Lodestar repo and the Lodestar team, as well as how we're going to translate all of our plans into the relevant issues and divide up the work between us. I hope you enjoy the write-up. Thanks.
